titleStmt.title: SII 17.575: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 575. (A.R. No. 530 of 1904.) TIRUTTEṄGŪR, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Rajatagirīśvara temple.

This inscription is dated in the 38th year of Tribhuvanachchakravarttigaḷ Tribhuvanavīradēva, who took Madurai, Karuvūr, Īḻam and the Pāṇḍya's crowned head and who performed the vijaiyābhishēkam, and vīrābhishēkam, who is evidently identical with Kulōttuṅga III.

It records an exchange of the land called Tirumeykāval in Śivapādaśēkharanallūr, a dēvadāṉa of god Tiruveḷḷiyaṅguṉṟamuḍaiyār and 40 kaḻañju for two other pieces of land belonging to Karuppuḻāṉ Tiruchchōṟṟuttuṟai uḍaiyāṉ (see No. 574 above)

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tri
bhuvanaccakrava
ttikaḷ maturai
yuṅ karuvūrum Īḻa
muṅ koṇṭu pāṇ
ṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ
koṇṭaruḷi vicaiyābhi
ṣekamum virābhiṣekamu
m paṇṇi Aruḷiṉa tribhu
vanaviradevarkku yā
ṇṭu 3 10 8 Uṭaiyār tiru
veḷḷiyaṅkuṉṟa muṭai
yār tevatāṉam civapāta
cekaranallūril tirumey
kāval Eṉṟu perkūvap
paṭṭa nilam nālumāvum Iṉ
nilatta maikku nāṟpatu kaḻañ
cum karuppuḻāṉ tiruccoṟṟu
ttuṟai Uṭaiyāṉukkuk ku
ṭuttu Iṉnilattukkut talai
māṟu Ivaṉ kāṇiyāṉa vaṭavicai
yāṉ paḷḷattu veḷḷarivā
vai nilam Iraṇṭumā mukkāṇi
yum pāḷaippaṉil teṟkaṭaiya ni
lam mākāṇiyuṅ kaikkoṇṭa
maikkumāka meykāvalil viṭ
ṭa nilam vaṭavicaiyāṉ paḷḷat
tile Iṟuttukkoḷḷavum kaṭa
vaṉāka cammatittamaikku .:—
Digital edition of SII 17.575 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
